#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct CoordMessage {
    x: f64,
    y: f64,
    z: f64,
}

// GOOD: pass the struct directly for in-process communication
fn send_to_worker(coord: CoordMessage) {
    channel.send(coord);
}

fn receive_from_worker(channel: &Channel) -> CoordMessage {
    channel.recv().unwrap()
}

fn process_batch(coords: &[CoordMessage]) {
    for coord in coords {
        send_to_worker(*coord);
    }
}
